selected_goal: Create a small review pack from output-integrity suspicious rendered-crop candidates.
why_this_now: The previous cycle ended with 31 ranked suspicious crop candidates and explicitly recommended visual review before adding more generic audit metadata.
repo_evidence: .agent-runs/2026-06-19T08-10-11-928Z/governor-review.json recommends visually inspecting and repairing the ranked suspicious crops.
src/exam_bank/triage.py already writes HTML review galleries and review.jsonl placeholders.
.agent-loop/BACKLOG.md includes generating small review packs for suspicious output samples.
acceptance_criteria: A reusable function creates a review iteration from output-integrity suspicious rendered-crop candidates.
The review pack contains summary.json, sample.json, index.html, and review.jsonl without copying or rewriting canonical images.
A CLI command exposes the review-pack creation with input, artifact root, output root, iteration, and sample-size options.
test_expectations: Add a test that writes valid PNGs, creates a suspicious-crop review pack, and verifies ranked sample content and escaped gallery output.
Update CLI surface tests to include the new command.
implementation_boundaries: Reuse the existing triage gallery where practical.
Do not visually classify or repair crops in this iteration.
repo_hygiene_risk: Low. Generated review packs go under the caller-supplied output root; tests use tmp_path.
rollback_plan: Remove the new triage function, CLI command, and tests.
done_when: Targeted triage/runtime tests pass and a live run-local review pack can be generated from current output.
